series.series_zh: 兰花系列 · 特别的花
series.title: Phalaenopsis — Nine Colorways
series.tagline: The orchid was chosen for one reason: no other flower has this silhouette. Nine colour stories, each named after a feeling.
series.tagline_zh: 选择兰花，只因没有任何花拥有这样的花型。九款色系，每一款以一种感受命名。
series.story:
There is a reason the orchid appears across East Asian art for over a thousand years: it is one of the few flowers whose silhouette is immediately, unmistakably itself. Wing-like, poised, quietly extraordinary.

This series begins from that single fact. No extra leaves, no decorative tendrils. Just the flower — wound thread by thread until it becomes the thing it always was.

Nine colour stories, each named for a sensory memory:
Honey Peach Oolong (蜜桃乌龙) · Into the Emerald Forest (绿野仙踪) · Sea Salt Mango Ice (海盐芒果冰) · Frozen Wonderland (冰雪奇缘) · Gilded Dreams (澛金旧梦) · Starry Moon Night (星月夜) · Taro Waves (芋泥啵啵) · Lavender Mist (薰衣草) · Deep Ocean (深海蓝)

Available as earrings (耳钉), clip-on (耳夹), rings (戒指), and pendants (挂坠).
series.story_zh:
兰花在东亚艺术中出现逾千年，原因只有一个：没有任何花的花型如此特别——如翅膀般展开，宁静而卓越。

这个系列从这一事实出发。没有多余的叶片，没有装饰性卷须，只有这朵花——一圈一圈地缠绕，直到它成为它本来就是的样子。

九款色系，每一款以一种感官记忆命名：
蜜桃乌龙 · 绿野仙踪 · 海盐芒果冰 · 冰雪奇缘 · 澛金旧梦 · 星月夜 · 芋泥啵啵 · 薰衣草 · 深海蓝

提供耳钉、耳夹、戒指与挂坠。
series.price: 耳钉 $79/pr · 耳挂 $60 · 戒指/挂坠 from $80
series.price_zh: 耳钉 $79一对 · 耳挂 $60一只 · 戒指/挂坠 $80起

series.series_zh: 四时之景 · 春 · 月下逢
series.title: Lily in Moonlight
series.tagline: White silk with blue-ombre edges. Amber and jade. The luminosity of spring moonlight.
series.tagline_zh: 白色蚕丝渐染蓝边，琥珀珠与玉珠，春夜月光的流光感。
series.story:
Inspired by Du Fu:

「若非群玉山头见，会向瑶台月下逢。」

The lily is rendered in white silk with blue-ombre edges — petals fading from pure white at the centre to the cool blue of a night sky at the tips. Gold copper wire curves freely outward like tendrils, catching light the way a living stem catches moonlight.

Yellow amber (琥珀珠) and white jade (玉珠) are scattered along the wire — warm against cool, earth against sky.

Full set: hairpin (发簪), brooches (胸针), ring, earrings (耳夹 + 耳挂).
series.story_zh:
灵感来自杜甫诗句：「若非群玉山头见，会向瑶台月下逢。」

白色蚕丝花瓣边缘渐染蓝色，从花心纯白过渡至花尖夜空蓝。金色铜丝自由延伸如藤蔓，黄色琥珀珠与白色玉珠点缀其间——暖与冷、土地与天空的对比。

整套：发簪、胸针、戒指、耳饰（耳夹+耳挂）。

series.series_zh: 四时之景 · 夏 · 一一风荷举
series.title: Lotus Rising
series.tagline: Pale green and blush-white petals, frozen mid-rise. Freshwater pearls and jade in summer stillness.
series.tagline_zh: 淡绿与藕白花瓣，凝固于上升一息之间。淡水珍珠与翡翠珠，夏日的静谧。
series.story:
Inspired by Zhou Bangyan 《苏幕遮》:

「水面清圆，一一风荷举。」

This collection captures one suspended moment: the instant a lotus lifts on a summer breeze and hangs there, weightless, before settling again.

Pale green and blush-white silk petals tip upward as if mid-breath. Freshwater pearls (淡水珍珠) and jade beads (翡翠珠) nestle among them — cool and still, like the water beneath.

Full set: hairpin (发簪), brooches (胸针), ring (戒指), earrings (耳夹 + 耳挂).
series.story_zh:
灵感来自周邦彦《苏幕遮》：「水面清圆，一一风荷举。」

这个系列定格一个瞬间：莲花花瓣在夏风中轻轻扬起，悬在半空，凝固于起落之间。

淡绿与藕白丝绸花瓣花尖上翘，如同凝固于风中一息。淡水珍珠与翡翠珠点缀其间，清凉静谧如花下湖水。

整套：发簪、胸针、戒指、耳饰（耳夹+耳挂）。

series.series_zh: 四时之景 · 秋 · 月桂流金
series.title: Osmanthus in Gold
series.tagline: Gold osmanthus clusters, deep olive leaves. Autumn made wearable.
series.tagline_zh: 金黄桂花簇，墨绿金边叶，可佩戴的秋天。
series.story:
「月桂流金」— Moonlit Osmanthus in Flowing Gold.

In nature, osmanthus blossoms are tiny — easily overlooked on the branch. Here they are intentionally enlarged so the four-petal structure becomes something you can truly see and appreciate.

Gold and amber blooms against deep olive-green metallic leaves — the exact palette of an October moon-viewing evening.

Three forms:
· Lattice brooches (花窗胸针) — osmanthus blooming from a woven bamboo-lattice base
· Hairpin (发簪) — gold U-pin with osmanthus, pearls, amber beads, white jade disc
· Hair crown (发冠) — curved gold frame, jade beads, leaf pendants

Featured on CCTV Spring Festival Gala 2026.
series.story_zh:
「月桂流金」——月光下流金般的桂花。

自然界的桂花极小，容易被忽视。在这个系列中，花朵被有意放大，让四瓣结构成为可以真正被欣赏的焦点。

金黄色桂花簇与墨绿色金边叶片——十月赏月夜晚的精准色彩。

三种形式：
· 花窗胸针——桂花从竹编镂空底座中绽放
· 发簪——金色U型，配桂花、珍珠、琥珀珠与白玉月片
· 发冠——金色弧形框架，翡翠珠与叶片挂坠

★ 2026年央视春晚亮相

series.series_zh: 四时之景 · 冬 · 却下水晶帘
series.title: Crystal Curtain
series.tagline: A Li Bai poem in silk and crystal. A still winter night, a luminous moon behind glass.
series.tagline_zh: 李白诗意，以丝绸与水晶重现。静冬夜色，月光透过水晶帘。
series.story:
「却下水晶帘，玲珑望秋月。」
— Li Bai

At the centre: a large translucent moon disc, semi-opaque white, faintly luminous. Around it, small five-petal flowers in lavender and blue-white bloom along gold copper wire — the cool night-sky palette.

Gold wire curls outward like uncurling fern fronds. Crystal-clear chain tassels (水晶流苏) hang from the lower arc, catching light with every movement — moonbeams through a crystal curtain.

Presented as a hairpin set (发簪) with a companion brooch.
series.story_zh:
「却下水晶帘，玲珑望秋月。」——李白

中央是一枚大型半透明圆形月片，淡淡发光。周围，薰衣草紫与蓝白渐变的五瓣小花沿金色铜丝绽放——夜空独有的清冷色调。

金色铜丝自由延伸如蕨类舒展，下方垂落水晶透明链条流苏——随风摇曳，折射月光透过水晶帘的意象。

以发簪套装形式呈现，搭配一枚胸针。

series.series_zh: 亲情系列 · 告诉我们你们的故事
series.title: Kinship — Tell Us Your Story
series.title_zh: 亲情系列 · 三代的故事
series.tagline: Tell us about three generations. About a grandmother's hands, a daughter's eyes. We make the piece that holds the story.
series.tagline_zh: 告诉我们三代人的故事。祖母的双手，女儿的眼睛。我们做出承载这个故事的那件珠宝。
series.story:
The Kinship Series begins with a conversation, not a catalogue.

Tell us about the people. The grandmother who taught her granddaughter how to fold paper. The mother and daughter who share the same laugh. The three sisters who grew up in the same house and now live on three continents.

We ask about their stories, their seasons, their colours. Then we design pieces that speak to each other — not matching, but related. Like the people who will wear them.

Available as paired sets or family collections. Every piece comes with a handwritten story card.
series.story_zh:
亲情系列从一次对话开始，不是从商品目录开始。

告诉我们关于这些人的故事。教孙女折纸的祖母。分享同一种笑声的母女。在同一栋房子里长大、如今分居三大洲的三姐妹。

我们询问她们的故事、她们的季节、她们的颜色。然后我们设计出彼此呼应的作品——不是完全相同，而是有关联的，就像佩戴它们的人一样。

提供成对套装或家族系列。每件作品附手写故事卡。

series.series_zh: 定制系列 · 主推兰花
series.title: Bespoke — Begin with the Flower
series.title_zh: 定制系列 · 先选花形，再选颜色
series.tagline: Choose your flower. Then its color. Then its jewels. Then tell us your story. From $140.
series.tagline_zh: 选择花形，再选颜色，再选珠宝，最后告诉我们你的故事。$140起。
series.story:
Every bespoke commission begins with the flower.

The orchid is our signature — nine colour families, each producing a different emotional register. The lotus accepts blue and blush. The osmanthus works in gold and amber. The lily in moonlit white.

Once the flower is chosen, we guide you through colour: not just which colour, but what feeling. Then the jewels: which gemstones catch the light the way you want. Then the story — the occasion, the person, the memory this piece should carry.

No two bespoke pieces are the same. Each one ends with a personalised story card, documenting the choices and the meaning behind them.
series.story_zh:
每一件定制委托从花开始。

兰花是我们的招牌——九款色系，每款产生不同的情感共鸣。荷花可定制蓝色与粉色。桂花以金色和琥珀色为主。百合以月光白为基调。

选好花形后，我们引导你选择颜色——不只是哪种颜色，而是什么感受。然后是珠宝：哪种宝石在光线下的折射符合你的期待。最后是故事——这件珠宝要承载的场合、那个人、那段记忆。

没有两件定制作品完全相同。每件作品附一张个人故事卡，记录选择的过程与背后的意义。
